use: License JWT signing for ArmoredGate license platform (license.armored.app). Signs ARMOR-1- prefixed JWT tokens that gate Volt CLI Pro/Enterprise features.
signature_format: JWT (JWS) with raw r||s ECDSA signature (96 bytes), base64url-encoded
rotation_plan: Targeted Q3 2026, with non-disruptive overlap (kid header binds tokens to specific key version)
automation_model: 24/7 automated signing via attached service account (Stripe webhooks trigger issuance). Distinct from image-signing-root which uses time-bounded ceremony bindings.

verification_recipe.jwt: Verify ES384 JWT signature against the PEM-encoded public key. The kid header (e.g., 'license-issuer-2026-q2/v1') identifies which key version signed the token; verifiers cache pubkeys keyed by kid for rotation support.
verification_recipe.note: License tokens are NOT verified via openssl directly; the Volt CLI embeds this PEM at build time and uses the ECDSA library to verify ES384 JWTs.
